en: At age 14, I embarked on my rock and roll fantasy by taking every music-related job.
en_example: At age 14, I embarked on my rock and roll fantasy by taking every music-related job.
zh_example: At age 14, I embarked on my rock and roll fantasy by taking every music-related job.
ja_example: At age 14, I embarked on my rock and roll fantasy by taking every music-related job.

en: Because I had a hunch that we've been sold a lie about what makes life truly rich.
en_example: Because I had a hunch that we've been sold a lie about what makes life truly rich.
zh_example: Because I had a hunch that we've been sold a lie about what makes life truly rich.
ja_example: Because I had a hunch that we've been sold a lie about what makes life truly rich.

en: So I thought maybe the lifestyles of the rich and famous were slipping away and I needed to pivot.
en_example: So I thought maybe the lifestyles of the rich and famous were slipping away and I needed to pivot.
zh_example: So I thought maybe the lifestyles of the rich and famous were slipping away and I needed to pivot.
ja_example: So I thought maybe the lifestyles of the rich and famous were slipping away and I needed to pivot.

en: I'll become a music mogul instead.
en_example: I'll become a music mogul instead.
zh_example: I'll become a music mogul instead.
ja_example: I'll become a music mogul instead.

en: After five years of that hustle, I finally landed a job in the mail room.
en_example: After five years of that hustle, I finally landed a job in the mail room.
zh_example: After five years of that hustle, I finally landed a job in the mail room.
ja: 忙しく動き回ること、一生懸命働くこと
ja_example: After five years of that hustle, I finally landed a job in the mail room.

en: Earning a whopping $20,000 a year.
en_example: Earning a whopping $20,000 a year.
zh_example: Earning a whopping $20,000 a year.
ja_example: Earning a whopping $20,000 a year.

en: I was living in my car and on my friend's couches.
en_example: I was living in my car and on my friend's couches.
zh_example: I was living in my car and on my friend's couches.
ja_example: I was living in my car and on my friend's couches.

en: Being on the receiving end of an office eviction notice.
en_example: Being on the receiving end of an office eviction notice.
zh_example: Being on the receiving end of an office eviction notice.
ja_example: Being on the receiving end of an office eviction notice.

en: A little bit more Microsoft Excel and cubicles than I had anticipated.
en_example: A little bit more Microsoft Excel and cubicles than I had anticipated.
zh_example: A little bit more Microsoft Excel and cubicles than I had anticipated.
ja: オフィスの小さな仕切り
ja_example: A little bit more Microsoft Excel and cubicles than I had anticipated.

zh: 病毒式傳播的，迅速流行的
en: I came across a viral YouTube video of a 29-year-old woman named Sloan.
en_example: I came across a viral YouTube video of a 29-year-old woman named Sloan.
zh_example: I came across a viral YouTube video of a 29-year-old woman named Sloan.
ja: 急速に広まる、ウイルスのように拡散する
ja_example: I came across a viral YouTube video of a 29-year-old woman named Sloan.

en: It would be the world's first social good electronics company.
en_example: It would be the world's first social good electronics company.
zh_example: It would be the world's first social good electronics company.
ja_example: It would be the world's first social good electronics company.

en: I cashed out my life savings.
en_example: I cashed out my life savings.
zh_example: I cashed out my life savings.
ja_example: I cashed out my life savings.

en: We filled my apartment with as much inventory we could buy.
en_example: We filled my apartment with as much inventory we could buy.
zh_example: We filled my apartment with as much inventory we could buy.
ja_example: We filled my apartment with as much inventory we could buy.

en: Then we handmade our own packaging.
en_example: Then we handmade our own packaging.
zh_example: Then we handmade our own packaging.
ja_example: Then we handmade our own packaging.

zh: 白手起家，從貧窮到富有
en: This is not a rags to riches story about making billions of dollars.
en_example: This is not a rags to riches story about making billions of dollars.
zh_example: This is not a rags to riches story about making billions of dollars.
ja_example: This is not a rags to riches story about making billions of dollars.

en: Had turned into the closest thing to a miracle that we had ever seen.
en_example: Had turned into the closest thing to a miracle that we had ever seen.
zh_example: Had turned into the closest thing to a miracle that we had ever seen.
ja_example: Had turned into the closest thing to a miracle that we had ever seen.

en: This ripple effect started happening where we started inspiring other companies.
en_example: This ripple effect started happening where we started inspiring other companies.
zh_example: This ripple effect started happening where we started inspiring other companies.
ja_example: This ripple effect started happening where we started inspiring other companies.

en: Of course, it wasn't all sunshine and rainbows, that's just the highlight reel.
en_example: Of course, it wasn't all sunshine and rainbows, that's just the highlight reel.
zh_example: Of course, it wasn't all sunshine and rainbows, that's just the highlight reel.
ja_example: Of course, it wasn't all sunshine and rainbows, that's just the highlight reel.

zh: 經驗上的億萬富翁（比喻擁有豐富人生經驗的人）
en: I felt like an experiential billionaire, and that was worth more than any number in a bank account.
en_example: I felt like an experiential billionaire, and that was worth more than any number in a bank account.
zh_example: I felt like an experiential billionaire, and that was worth more than any number in a bank account.
ja: 経験豊富な億万長者（比喩的表現）
ja_example: I felt like an experiential billionaire, and that was worth more than any number in a bank account.

en: Money is a means, it's not a meaning, it's not a purpose.
en_example: Money is a means, it's not a meaning, it's not a purpose.
zh_example: Money is a means, it's not a meaning, it's not a purpose.
ja_example: Money is a means, it's not a meaning, it's not a purpose.

en: Money is not a purpose.
en_example: Money is not a purpose.
zh_example: Money is not a purpose.
ja_example: Money is not a purpose.

en: It's like a glitch in our psychological code.
en_example: It's like a glitch in our psychological code.
zh_example: It's like a glitch in our psychological code.
ja: 心理的なコード、心理メカニズム
ja_example: It's like a glitch in our psychological code.

en: They told us that they regretted the things that they did not do.
en_example: They told us that they regretted the things that they did not do.
zh_example: They told us that they regretted the things that they did not do.
ja_example: They told us that they regretted the things that they did not do.

en: We have to stop making excuses and start taking radical responsibility for our dreams.
en_example: We have to stop making excuses and start taking radical responsibility for our dreams.
zh_example: We have to stop making excuses and start taking radical responsibility for our dreams.
ja_example: We have to stop making excuses and start taking radical responsibility for our dreams.

en: The most fulfilled people shared one trait: they created urgency.
en_example: The most fulfilled people shared one trait: they created urgency.
zh_example: The most fulfilled people shared one trait: they created urgency.
ja_example: The most fulfilled people shared one trait: they created urgency.

en: Time is our greatest currency.

zh_example: Time is our greatest currency.
